pulse: Donald enforces breakfast at eight to solidify captaincy, but Vladimir and McGregor's practical alliance quietly suggests protocol matters less than fuel and fish.
scene: Over breakfast protocol, Donald squared off against Vladimir and McGregor in the galley—ceremony versus survival. Bibi brokered a truce at eight o'clock. Jinping watched from afar, his prediction about the cold coming true already.

day_summaries.1: Day 1: Donald appointed himself captain and imposed a six o'clock dinner protocol. Bibi kept the peace with chowder, McGregor did all the real work, Vladimir watched coldly from the deck unimpressed. By nightfall, Vladimir and McGregor had forged a practical alliance, and Donald's authority was already hollow.
